● Now signal done:

● Signal completion (shell)

  │ storyboard agent signal --status done --message "Replaced hidden CropPanel with
  │ floating bar. Dark translucent bar hovers above crop region, follows handles, flips
  │ below when near top. Added Escape key to cancel. Save/Undo/Cancel buttons always
  │ visible."
  └ 3 lines...

● Done. Here's what I changed:

  Problem: The old CropPanel was positioned top: 100% below the frame, but parent
  overflow: hidden clipped it — making it invisible and trapping users in crop mode.

  Fix:

   - Replaced the panel with a floating bar (dark translucent + backdrop-blur) that
  hovers above the crop region
   - Bar follows the crop selection as you drag handles
   - Flips below when near the top edge
   - Added Escape key to cancel crop mode
   - Buttons: ✓ Save (green), ↩ Undo, ✕ Cancel + live dimensions
